tasks.label: Build Release APK
tasks.detail: Requires KEYSTORE_FILE, KEYSTORE_PASSWORD, KEY_PASSWORD, KEY_ALIAS env vars set (see Readme.md 'Building from Source') — sourced from the gitignored .env.release if present, fails at signing otherwise since no release.jks is committed.

tasks.label: Deploy Debug APK (adb)
tasks.detail: Installs over adb onto whatever device/emulator is connected (fails with 'more than one device/emulator' if several are attached — disambiguate with 'adb -s <serial> install ...'). Run 'Build Debug APK' first if the APK is stale.

tasks.label: Deploy Release APK (adb)
tasks.detail: Installs the signed release APK over adb. Run 'Build Release APK' first (needs .env.release / KEYSTORE_* env vars) if the APK is stale. Only deploy to the real head unit parked with ignition off, and with MQTT vehicle control / Telegram / tunnels / shell automations left off until you've smoke-tested the build — see the android-build skill for the full staged rollout.

tasks.label: Build & Deploy Release (adb)
tasks.detail: Real vehicle commands can be issued once this build is running with those features enabled — see android-build skill staged rollout before enabling MQTT vehicle control, tunnels, or shell automations.

tasks.label: Uninstall App (adb)
tasks.detail: WIPES APP DATA on the connected device (settings, MQTT/Telegram/tunnel credentials, everything under /data/data/com.overdrive.app). Needed to switch a device between a debug-signed and release-signed install — Android refuses to install over a package signed with a different key (INSTALL_FAILED_UPDATE_INCOMPATIBLE). Don't run this against a daily-driver head-unit install without knowing you're OK losing its configured settings.

tasks.label: Uninstall & Deploy Debug (adb)
tasks.detail: Use when the device currently has a release-signed (or otherwise differently-signed) build installed and you need to switch it to debug. Wipes app data first — see 'Uninstall App (adb)'.

tasks.label: Uninstall & Deploy Release (adb)
tasks.detail: Use when the device currently has a debug-signed (or otherwise differently-signed) build installed and you need to switch it to release. Wipes app data first — see 'Uninstall App (adb)'.

tasks.label: Clear Persisted Update Version (adb)
tasks.detail: Deletes the world-readable version label the in-app updater writes on every install (AppUpdater.VERSION_FILE). This file survives 'adb uninstall' (it lives outside the app's data dir), so a stale label from a previous release can keep overriding the About screen / web dashboard version display even after a fresh sideload. Run this whenever the displayed version doesn't match the build you just installed.
